title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official CLI and server for running large language models locally (Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, etc.) with a simple pull/run workflow.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for the Ollama server; chat, generate, embed, list models from Node or browsers.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client and asyncio bindings for Ollama; chat, generate, pull, push models with a few lines of code.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration that wraps Ollama models as LLMs and chat models for chains, agents, RAG pipelines.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (chat UI, model management, multi-user, OpenAI-compatible endpoint toggle).

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama; chat, generate, pull, embed with fluent builder API and Spring Boot starters.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Ruby gem providing idiomatic client for Ollama chat, generate, embeddings, model ops.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Rust-based interactive CLI that wraps Ollama with chat history, syntax highlighting, and prompt templates.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: Turn any Ollama model into a GitHub Copilot-style code-completion proxy for VS Code and other editors.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration letting you use Ollama models as generators or embedders in Haystack pipelines.

title: ollama-camunda
summary: Community Camunda Connectors that invoke Ollama for human-task summarization, DMN feel expressions, etc.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Discord bot that streams Ollama chat completions into channels with slash commands and thread support.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU node selection and PVC model cache.

title: ollama-nix
summary: Official Nix flake and package definition for Ollama server and CLI, enabling reproducible installs.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module example that spins up Ollama in a container for CI-based LLM testing or doc generation.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal Streamlit app demonstrating RAG with Ollama embeddings + Chroma vector store and Llama-2 chat.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack Bolt app that adds /ollama slash command to query local models with streaming replies.

title: ollama-express
summary: Lightweight Express.js proxy that adds JWT auth, rate-limiting, and CORS headers in front of Ollama.

title: ollama-terraform
summary: Experimental Terraform provider to declaratively manage Ollama models and prompts as code.

title: ollama-dotnet
summary: .NET 8 client library for Ollama with strongly-typed chat and embeddings APIs plus Blazor sample.
